zones.source_citation: Section 504, Table (Commercial Zoning District Development Standards), printed p. 5-10
zones.notes: side_setback_ft is interior side (5 ft); street-side side setback 15 ft; rear 5 ft. Height max 30 ft; within 20 ft of a Rural or Residential district no building may exceed 15 ft. max_density_dua, max_far and max_stories not stated. Parking per Ch.8 Sec.802 (separate article).

zones.zone_name: C-S Planned Shopping Center Zoning District
zones.source_citation: Section 504, Table (Commercial Zoning District Development Standards), printed p. 5-10
zones.notes: Min lot 217,800 sf (5 acres). Lot width minimum listed as N/A in ordinance (no numeric value) so recorded TBD. side_setback_ft is interior side (50 ft); street-side side setback also 50 ft; rear 50 ft. max_density_dua, max_far and max_stories not stated. Parking per Ch.8 Sec.802.

zones.source_citation: Section 504, Table (Commercial Zoning District Development Standards), printed p. 5-10

Street-side side setback 15 ft. max_density_dua, max_far and max_stories not stated. Parking per Ch.8 Sec.802.

zones.source_citation: Section 506, Table (Industrial Zoning Districts Development Standards), printed p. 5-14
zones.notes: Lot coverage 60%, front 20 ft, street-side side 10 ft, and height 60 ft are single merged-cell values applying to all industrial districts. side_setback_ft is interior side: None required, except 10 ft adjacent to a Rural or Residential district; base minimum recorded as 0. Rear 10 ft. max_density_dua, max_far and max_stories not stated. Parking per Ch.8 Sec.802.
